channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Marathon Ranked Play Begins This Weekend
item.content:encoded:
Ranked play in Marathon begins very soon. In fact, it begins this Saturday, March 21, 2026. Bungie announced the news on social media.

According to the announcement, the mode is still in development for the first season. Therefore, the developers are seeking the most substantial feedback from players to help continue shaping the mode.

Marathon Ranked Play Structure

In this mode, players earn points by hitting score targets set by a special item called the Holotag. As you gain Ranked Points, you progress through six ranks. Ranks range from Bronze to Pinnacle, with each rank divided into three tiers. At the end of each season, you receive rewards based on your highest rank, encouraging players to keep playing without losing progress. Each season also offers exclusive rewards available only through Ranked play.

Rewards for the first season include gun styles and titles. Players need to reach Runner Level 25 to join Ranked matches, which are available on weekends. Each weekend features a different zone: Perimeter, Dire Marsh, or Outpost. This weekend starts with Perimeter. Crew sizes will be matched, allowing for team games or solo challenges against opposing players.

Learn more about the new mode by reading the official release at this link.

For more on Marathon from Insider Gaming, check out the latest patch notes. Insider Gaming will continue to bring the latest on Marathon as more information is released.

Have you checked out Marathon yet? What do you think of the game so far? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

item.title: Geekay Announce 2026 Rainbow Six Siege Roster
item.content:encoded:
Geekay has announced its Rainbow Six Siege roster for the 2026 season as the team prepares for its Europe MENA League (EML) debut. The announcement sees former Team Empire and Virtus.pro veteran Artur ‘ShepparD’ Ipatov move to the Head Coach role.

The roster will debut on March 30 when it kicks off its Europe MENA League 2026 Kickoff campaign, with teams like Falcons, Twisted Minds, G2, and Shifters in their way.

Geekay Esports announces roster changes after Affiliate Team status secured

Geekay announce the changes as they enter the EML as an Affiliate Team, giving the organisation greater access to the circuit’s benefits and powering up their competitive potential.

Despite those benefits, Geekay lost a key piece in the offseason, losing a standout piece in Nikita ‘RORICK’ Kruchinkin to Virtus.pro.

AsK joins Geekay after a year that saw AsK go back and forth between Black Dragons and Liquid. AsK started 2025 in Black Dragons before returning to Liquid for his second stint, where he was made inactive in August before returning to Black Dragons.

The Hibana and Smoke flex finished the season with a 17th-20th position finish at the Six Invitational in Paris, after the Brazilian roster defeated AsK’s former team, Liquid, at the South America LCQ.

Italy’s Sarks departs Fnatic after the team’s mediocre placements. Despite only a 7th-place finish in EML Stage 2, Sarks has maintained a strong reputation as a mechanically sharp entry, a necessary piece in this composition.

ShepparD moves to Head Coach after a storied career, which saw the Russian/Armenian IGL become a powerhouse of the region. ShepparD and Team Empire secured their biggest title at Six Major Raleigh 2019, defeating G2 3-1 in the Grand Final.

Geekay’s 2026 Rainbow Six Siege roster is:

  • Lucas ‘Hungry’ Konstantin Reich
  • Peter ‘Pacbull’ Bull
  • Czikai ‘Rexhun999’ Máté Gábor
  • Gabriel ‘AsK’ Santos
  • Leonardo ‘Sarks’ Sarchi
  • Artur ‘ShepparD’ Ipatov (Head Coach)
  • Murarz (Assistant Coach)
  • Noor (Manager)

You can discuss how you think Geekay will fare in 2026 on Insider Gaming’s Discord server!

For more esports news, see how BLG took care of G2 at First Stand 2026.

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

item.title: Today’s Wordle #1734: Hints and Answer for March 19, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Today’s tips and strategies can help you solve it faster and maintain your streak—if you’re open to a little extra help. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Wordle, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answer for Wordle Game #1734 for March 19, 2026

To play today’s Wordle, head to the game’s website. If you want to go right to today’s answer without any tips or tricks, you can click right here.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s and yesterday’s editions of Wordle. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Wordle

Wordle is a simple but addictive word puzzle. Each day, players have to guess a five-letter word answer in no more than six attempts. After each guess:

  • Green letters are correct and in the right position.
  • Yellow letters are correct, but in the wrong position.
  • Gray letters are not in the word at all.

The goal is to guess the word in as few tries as possible. Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Wordle can only be played on the New York Times website. There is currently no app for you to download the official game.

Wordle Hints For Today, March 19, 2026

The Wordle answer for game #1734 is a tough puzzle. According to the NY Times Wordle review, today’s answer takes an average of 4.8 out of 6 guesses. That makes it slightly harder than the 4.6-guess average from March 18.

General Wordle Hints For March 19

Without giving today’s Wordle answer completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: This word refers to a process, not a single moment.
  • Hint 2: It’s most often used in health or recovery contexts.
  • Hint 3: The situation it describes usually involves effort over time.
  • Hint 4: You’re more likely to hear this word in serious discussions than casual ones.

Use these clues to narrow down your guesses and increase your chances of solving Wordle #1734 for March 19, 2026.

Starter Words For March 19, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Wordle answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you figure out some included letters. A few starter words that may help are:

  • HEARD
  • REACH
  • ABIDE
  • BRAID

Today’s Wordle Answer For Game #1734 On March 19, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answer to today’s Wordle below.

Answer: REHAB

If you solved today’s Wordle without our answer, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

What Does Today’s Wordle Answer Mean?

REHAB is a noun that means “rehabilitation, especially a program or facility for treating persons addicted to drugs or alcohol or recovering from certain medical conditions.”

Yesterday’s Wordle Answer

If you missed the previous game, here’s yesterday’s Wordle answer for Game #1733 on March 18, 2026

Answer: AMPLY

While not always the case, looking at previous words can sometimes give you insight into common patterns or letter usage in Wordle puzzles.

When Is The Next Wordle Game After #1734?

Wordle games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours before to give players a heads up. The game on March 20 will be Wordle Game #1735.

What Is Wordle?

Wordle is a daily word puzzle created by Josh Wardle. Initially developed as a prototype in 2013, it wasn’t fully released until 2021. The game challenges players to guess a five-letter word in six tries or fewer, using hints from each attempt to narrow down the answer. Its straightforward concept, accessibility, and the thrill of solving a new puzzle each day helped it surge in popularity by late 2021. The success of Wordle inspired numerous spin-offs and social media challenges, leading to its acquisition by The New York Times in early 2022.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our weekly newsletter

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw

item.title: THQ Nordic Bringing Several Games to Nintendo Switch Consoles
item.content:encoded:
THQ Nordic has announced that it’s bringing several games to the Nintendo Switch family of consoles.

THQ Nordic announced on social media that it’s bringing four games to new platforms. Destroy All Humans! & Destroy All Humans! 2 – Reprobed and Disney’s Epic Mickey: Rebrushed are coming to the Nintendo Switch 2. All three of these games were previously available on the original Nintendo Switch

SpongeBob SquarePants: Titans of the Tide is being launched on the Nintendo Switch 1. It originally launched on the successor console when the game first dropped in November 2025.

More on Nintendo Switch Ports and the Switch 2’s Library

As the Nintendo Switch is commonly seen as a family-friendly console, it’s a no-brainer that the most recent SpongeBob SquarePants release would be made available to the wide user base that already owns the original Nintendo Switch. Our review of the latest underwater undertaking is available at this link.

Nintendo is currently relying heavily on third-party ports and “Nintendo Switch 2 Editions” of titles to help fill out the library of its latest console in its first year. There’s a rapid-fire release of games, but not all of them are brand new to players.

Nintendo also has at least one major first-party offering coming to the original Nintendo Switch next month. Learn more about the latest Tomodachi Life game at this link.

Will you be picking up any of these THQ Nordic releases? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Fortnite Teases Italian Brainrot Characters in New Video

Fortnite has just teased the arrival of Italian Brainrot skins like Tun Tun Sahur in a new video. Here are more details.

Marvel Rivals Season 7 Roadmap Revealed

NetEase has revealed the roadmap details for Season 7 of Marvel Rivals, including a new character and Battlepass.

Assassin’s Creed Series Announces New Cast Members

Ubisoft has confirmed new cast additions for the Assassin’s Creed live-action series. Here are more details.

NVIDIA CEO Says Gamers Are ‘Completely Wrong’ About DLSS 5

In a press Q&A with NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang, the CEO has said that those who have criticised DLSS 5 and the tech are “completely wrong”.

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Fortnite Teases Italian Brainrot Characters in New Video
item.content:encoded:
A new video has arrived teasing several new Fortnite characters, and eagle-eyed viewers have spotted two popular Italian brain-rot characters.

Fortnite is a title that is known for its collaborations; they recently announced a new crossover with Team Meat’s upcoming title, Super Meat Boy 3D. However, the developer is known for collaborating with all types of franchises, and the latest one might please Brainrot fans.

Fortnite Teases the Arrival of Tun Tun Sahur

A brand new video on the official Fortnite X account (formerly Twitter) takes players through a day in the life of the spawn island manager. In the process of taking players through those tasks, we see several old and new characters appear. One of the most prevalent characters in the video was Bugs Bunny. However, the more observant players have also spotted Tun Tun Sahur and Ballerina Cappucina from the Italian brainrot characters that seem to be coming to Fortnite.

At the moment, no details have been shared about what this collaboration will entail or when it will arrive in Fortnite, but one thing seems certain: Italian Brainrot skins are coming to Fortnite. Players will have to see if they bring some other elements to the Island as well, such as changes to the POI, new abilities, boss characters, and more. However, this is speculation; players should wait for an official announcement to know for sure.

In other news, Fortnite is finally going to be playable through the Google Play Store again. Additionally, Fortnite’s PvE Save the World mode will become free-to-play for all players in April 2026. What are your thoughts on Fortnite teasing Italian Brainrot characters? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about NetEase revealing the roadmap details for Season 7 of Marvel Rivals. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
